flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bakersfield College rose 41% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.4k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bakersfield College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $11.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bakersfield College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bakersfield College rose 37% between 2007 and 2010 (12.9k → 17.7k).
